description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Tests on Linux with LLVM that runs on push, pull request, and workflow dispatch events. Use an ubuntu-latest job with a matrix strategy for Python 3.9, checking out the code, setting up Python, upgrading pip, and installing various dependencies including LLVM, Z3, Capstone, Unicorn, LIEF, and Triton. Finally, run unittests with make check in the build directory.
